findings.description: The default format for SqlPStatement#executeBatchメソッドの更新終了時 uses $updateCount$ (not $batchCount$), but $updateCount$ is absent from s6's hints. An AI searching for $updateCount$ context in batch operations would not find s6.
findings.source_evidence: Source default format: `$\n\texecute_time(ms) = [$executeTime$] batch_count = [$updateCount$]` — uses $updateCount$ while the placeholder table lists $batchCount$. Both identifiers are present in the section and should be indexed.
